name: CANstressGetInfo
title: CANstressGetInfo
syntax: long CANstressGetInfo( char softwareVersion[], long swVersionBufLen, char firmwareVersion[], long fwVersionBufLen, char serialNumber[], long snBufLen, char canInterface1[], long if1BufLen, char canInterface2[], long if2BufLen );
description: Delivers information about CANstress software and the connected CAN hardware.

parameters.name: softwareVersion
parameters.description: Buffer in which the version of the software is written (recommended buffer size: 20 Byte).
